sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75033" key="o)rqofuh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρθο-φῠής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n75033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of straight growth,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg001:3:8:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.8.4</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
